Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Mystic Carving
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 3 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +26% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +19% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +40% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Frostbitten" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 17(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Cold
{ Prefix Modifier "Shattering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters Break Armour equal to 28(25-30)% of Physical Damage dealt
{ Suffix Modifier "of Fatigue" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 25(30-25)% less Cooldown Recovery Rate
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
